name: Tbilisi (Georgia)

colors.symbolism: the field of the flag, taken from the Georgian national flag
the central cross and the four bolnur-katskhuri crosses, taken from the Georgian national flag
the heraldic gold of the Tbilisi coat of arms in the canton

description: A Georgian-style five-cross flag — a large red Saint George's cross dividing the white field into quarters with smaller red bolnur-katskhuri crosses — with a yellow canton at the upper hoist bearing the coat of arms of Tbilisi.
history: Adopted on 27 April 2009 by the Tbilisi City Assembly. The design echoes the Georgian national flag (the five-cross flag of Saint George) and adds a canton with the city's coat of arms.

features.symbolism: the four bolnur-katskhuri crosses of the Georgian flag
